response.justification: The candidate lacks the required C++ development experience on Windows for a mid-senior role in capital markets. While they have extensive experience with various languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, D, Java, etc.), their C++ background is limited (only 'C and C++ components' at National Instruments, which does not align with the 5–10 years of professional C++ development specified in the job description). Additionally, there is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle experience or domain expertise in fixed income/investment banking.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to work in agile and test-driven environments (TDD, CI/CD)
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and mentorship (e.g., Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows (only basic C/C++ usage, not professional-grade)
No direct experience with SQL Server/Oracle or financial domain knowledge
Lacks mandatory technical skills (e.g., no Summit platform, limited SQL exposure)
